title: Astral Zinc
description: Adds zinc to some planets in Ad Astra.
body:
In 2017, the Curiosity rover found [elevated zinc concentrations](https://phys.org/news/2017-08-elevated-zinc-germanium-bolster-evidence.html) in Gale Crater, suggesting that there may have been liquid water and hydrothermal activity in the ancient past of Mars.

This mod adds zinc deposits to Mars and Glacio, bridging Create and Ad Astra.

I've tested for compatibility with Mekanism, and this mod works with both [JAOPCA](https://modrinth.com/mod/jaopca) and [More Mekanism Processing](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-mekanism-processing).
